steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject is “the 66-kilometer-per-second collision between these meteoroids and atmospheric gases.” The head noun is collision—singular, regardless of the modifiers around it.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Produces is singular and correctly agrees with the singular subject collision. The other three choices all use plural verb forms, which would require a plural subject. This matches choice A — A is correct.
